message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "Service" as service
participant "Access token guard" as guard
participant "Auth microservice" as auth
participant "Session module" as session
participant "Auth module" as auth_module

auth -> auth : Session module
auth -> auth : Auth module

service -> guard : request
guard -> guard : get headers
guard -> guard : check authentication header existence

alt [Authentication header is undefined]
  guard -> service : 401
end

guard -> guard : get access token from header
guard -> auth_module : validate access token
auth_module -> guard : result of validation

alt [Access token is Invalid]
  guard -> service : 401
end

guard -> auth_module : get embedded client id from access token
auth_module -> auth_module : extract id

alt [Client id is missing]
  auth_module -> guard : error
  guard -> service : 401
end

auth_module -> guard : client id
guard -> guard : modify request with client id
guard -> service : modified request

@enduml
